📖Open Book Reader — test sites

Click a card to open the page in a new tab, then invoke the extension (toolbar icon, or Alt+B text / Alt+Shift+B images).

Open DevTools → Console first and watch the [OpenBookReader] auto-mode → line to see why a mode was chosen (images, proseWords, thresholds). The Reader / Gallery badges are what the toolbar icon should auto-pick.

Pure article → Reader

Figure-rich long article → Reader (the reported bug)

Image gallery · lazy / infinite scroll → Gallery

Placeholder-lazy (real URL in data-src)

Virtualized / hard infinite scroll (stress “Load all”)

Controlled local demo (no network, deterministic)

Tip: scroll the gallery to watch progressive prefetch; hit ⟳ Load all to sweep the whole page.
Caveats: some sites change layout often or gate behind login/paywall (Pinterest, Amazon, some news). If Readability comes up thin, that's the page, not the extension — the local demo is your stable baseline.
